text: One harvests chemical energy; the other harvests light. Both processes are vital for life on Earth and beyond. Photosynthesis converts sunlight into energy, fueling plants and, ultimately, animals. On the flip side, chemosynthesis thrives in dark, extreme environments, like deep-sea vents. Both processes create ecosystems, proving life can adapt in unimaginable ways. Want to learn more about the science behind life? Hit subscribe!
